title: MCLN EX83 iLPN Status and Location Retention Configuration Guide - Copy
fullText: center 83548 EX83 iLPN Status and Location Retention Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. Global Extension Control Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc148020984 \h 3 1.1. Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc148020985 \h 3 2. EX80 Extension Control Code ID PAGEREF _Toc148020986 \h 5 2.1. C-000-EX83 Creation PAGEREF _Toc148020987 \h 5 2.2. C-000-EX83 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc148020988 \h 6 3. System Code E83 Creation and Setup PAGEREF _Toc148020989 \h 7 3.1. Putaway Transaction System Code PAGEREF _Toc148020990 \h 7 3.2. Putaway Transaction System Code PAGEREF _Toc148020991 \h 9 4. Transaction Parameter Configuration PAGEREF _Toc148020992 \h 11 4.1. Pull Full iLPN Transaction PAGEREF _Toc148020993 \h 11 Global Extension Control Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the system Code (Configuration) UI If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click add. Populate the following information. 0 323850 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the code IDs action Button. The system code IDs screen is displayed. Click Add. 0 323850 0 0 Populate the following information provided above. Click Save. Next, click the parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to navigate back to the system code parameter screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click Add Button. 0 323850 0 0 Populate the following information above. Click Save. Click on the parameters Tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 0 324485 Click Save. EX80 Extension Control Code ID C-000-EX83 Creation Navigat e to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000- EX83 if it has not been added. 0 196850 Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. Click SAVE. C-000-EX83 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. System Code E83 Creation and Setup Putaway Transaction System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-E83 does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Parameters Button Click Add and add the following Parameters with the information below. Putaway Transaction System Code On the C-E83 System Code screen click on the Code ID Action button. Click Add, and add Code ID Next click Parameters tab for the Code Id Fill out the Parameters with the Putaway Transaction Link Name Click Save. Transaction Parameter Configuration Pull Full iLPN Transaction Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI, Filter by Pull Select Pull Full iLPN Transaction, and click Program Template Select Add and fill in the information below to add the 503-503 Parameter and click Save. Enable EX83 on the required pull transactions, Pull Full iLPN INT1, Pull iLPN- Cases, Pull iLPN CaseActRepl F i ll Actv Transaction Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI, Filter by Fill Select Fill Actv Sys Dir Transaction, and click Program Template Select Add and fill in the information below to add 503-503 Parameter and click Save. In transaction parameters, Enable EX83 on the required fill transactions, Fill Actv Sys Dir, Fill CasePk-SysD , Fill CasePkRNB-SysD

[Document: MCLN EX83 iLPN Status and Location Retention Configuration Guide - Copy]

center 83548 EX83 iLPN Status and Location Retention Configuration Guide Table of Contents  1. Global Extension Control Code Setup  1.1. Enablement System Code  2. EX80 Extension Control Code ID  2.1. C-000-EX83 Creation  2.2. C-000-EX83 Enablement  3. System Code E83 Creation and Setup  3.1. Putaway Transaction System Code  3.2. Putaway Transaction System Code  4. Transaction Parameter Configuration  4.1. Pull Full iLPN Transaction  Global Extension Control Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the system Code (Configuration) UI If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click add. Populate the following information. 0 323850 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the code IDs action Button. The system code IDs screen is displayed. Click Add. 0 323850 0 0 Populate the following information provided above. Click Save. Next, click the parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to navigate back to the system code parameter screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click Add Button. 0 323850 0 0 Populate the following information above. Click Save. Click on the parameters Tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. 0 324485 Click Save. EX80 Extension Control Code ID C-000-EX83 Creation Navigat e to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C-000- EX83 if it has not been added. 0 196850 Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above. Click SAVE. C-000-EX83 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. System Code E83 Creation and Setup Putaway Transaction System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-E83 does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save.

[Document: MCLN EX83 iLPN Status and Location Retention Configuration Guide - Copy]

System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-E83 does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save.

Next, click the Parameters Button Click Add and add the following Parameters with the information below. Putaway Transaction System Code On the C-E83 System Code screen click on the Code ID Action button. Click Add, and add Code ID Next click Parameters tab for the Code Id Fill out the Parameters with the Putaway Transaction Link Name Click Save. Transaction Parameter Configuration Pull Full iLPN Transaction Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI, Filter by Pull Select Pull Full iLPN Transaction, and click Program Template Select Add and fill in the information below to add the 503-503 Parameter and click Save. Enable EX83 on the required pull transactions, Pull Full iLPN INT1, Pull iLPN- Cases, Pull iLPN CaseActRepl F i ll Actv Transaction Navigate to Transaction Parameters UI, Filter by Fill Select Fill Actv Sys Dir Transaction, and click Program Template Select Add and fill in the information below to add 503-503 Parameter and click Save. In transaction parameters, Enable EX83 on the required fill transactions, Fill Actv Sys Dir, Fill CasePk-SysD , Fill CasePkRNB-SysD
